bead.title: ddx integration: remove ModelRef and --model-ref from Fizeau call sites
bead.description:
Fizeau review of fizeau-32e533bb found the Fizeau coordination bead was closed without verifiable DDx-side migration. Current DDx still has production hits for --model-ref / ModelRef and cli/go.mod pins github.com/easel/fizeau v0.12.0 rather than the stated v0.11 handoff.

Problem:
DDx should pass Fizeau route constraints through using the current Policy/Model vocabulary and must not keep old ModelRef or --model-ref call sites after Fizeau ADR-009 removed that public surface.

In scope:
- DDx CLI/internal call sites that mention ModelRef or --model-ref when invoking Fizeau
- tests proving DDx uses current Fizeau request fields
- go.mod/go.sum update only if needed to align with current Fizeau API

Out of scope:
- Fizeau repository changes; this is the upstream DDx side of fizeau-32e533bb.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n "ModelRef|model-ref|--model-ref" cli --glob "*.go" --glob "*.md" returns no production or help-text hits except historical changelog/migration notes explicitly marked removed.
2. cd cli && go test ./internal/... ./cmd/... -run "Fizeau|Route|Model|Policy" -count=1 passes.
3. cd cli && go test ./... -count=1 passes.

events.body: {"rationale":"Four criteria fail: (1) Root cause is missing a concrete file:line reference — the description names cli/go.mod but cites no specific Go source path:line for any offending ModelRef or --model-ref call site; a cold agent must search from scratch rather than opening a named location. (2) AC is missing the mandatory `lefthook run pre-commit passes` gate as a final criterion; the rubric requires it explicitly. (3) No `phase:N` label is present; the rubric requires it in every bead. (4) Parent and dependencies are not stated at all — even a bare 'Parent: none. Deps: none.' is required. Four criteria pass: title is imperative and names subsystem + change clearly; AC is numbered and includes a `-run` regex filter satisfying the test-name requirement; AC1 provides a wired-in `rg` assertion with exact flags; description includes an explicit non-scope section and contains no /tmp references or chat-session citations.","score":4,"suggested_fixes":["Run `rg -n 'ModelRef|model-ref|--model-ref' cli --glob '*.go'` before filing and inline the top 2-3 offending file:line pairs into the description's ROOT CAUSE section.","Append a fourth AC item: `4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.`","Add a `phase:N` label (e.g. `phase:4` for an iterate-phase cleanup bead).","Add an explicit parent/deps line to the description — e.g. 'Parent: none. Deps: none.' or cite the parent epic bead ID."],"waivers_applied":[]}
